notes: Core loop works with enemies, bullets, lives, and stages, but visuals are bare wireframe shapes lacking any Galaga sprite fidelity, the entrance animation is buggy (y accumulates incorrectly), and the dual-fighter mechanic is oversimplified.

Playable but notably incomplete as Galaga: tiny enemy formation, no real capture/rescue implementation despite claiming it, simplified visuals and mechanics, though basic movement/shooting/pause/restart work without obvious fatal errors.
